statement.markdown:
title: ## Neon Glow Effect
description: Create an animated neon glow effect on a text using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
requirements
1. Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.
2. The neon glow effect should be animated when the cursor is hovering over the text.
3. The animation should fade out when the cursor is moved away from the text.
4. The text should be centered horizontally and vertically on the page.
5. The animation should be smooth and should not consume much CPU.

starterCode.html: NEON GLOW TEXT

gradingCriteria.description: The neon glow effect should be animated when the cursor is hovering over the text.
The neon glow effect should have a smooth and stylish appearance.
The animation should not consume much CPU and should be smooth.
The text should be centered horizontally and vertically on the page.
